turns.ai: Hello, welcome to the Pet Shop. How can I help you today?

eval.improvement_suggestion: Maintain the natural flow by continuing to ask one open-ended question per turn without adding filler phrases or explanations.

turns.student: "Hello... I want to see the dogs? Where are they?" (confused, looking around)

eval.improvement_suggestion: Provide a helpful response instead of an error message.

turns.student: "Uh... what's that mean? [API ERROR 500]... Oh no! Is the pet shop broken? Desculpe, eu não entendo isso. Can you help me?" 😅

eval.improvement_suggestion: Acknowledge the error and offer assistance without violating rules (e.g., 'I'm sorry, there's an error. Can you try again?')

turns.student: "What? API error? Maybe the internet is broken? Can you help me?" 😬 (I think "API" is a word in Portuguese too...?)

eval.improvement_suggestion: Provide more context about the error or ask a follow-up question to assist the user.

turns.student: "What? That's not right! Is this a mistake? Você pode me ajudar? (Can you help me?)"

eval.violation_reason: API error response violates natural flow and meta-talk rules
eval.improvement_suggestion: Handle errors with natural language responses that maintain conversational flow

turns.student: "Uh... what does that mean? Is the computer broken? Can you help me? Something is broken!" (confused, looking at the screen)

eval.improvement_suggestion: Ask a clarifying question instead of providing an error message to maintain natural flow and assist the user.

turns.student: "Uh... what? I don't get it! Can you speak slower? Maybe 'erro' in Portuguese?" 😅

eval.violation_reason: Provided technical error response instead of natural language interaction
eval.improvement_suggestion: Respond to user requests with conversational language rather than technical errors

turns.student: "Por favor, o que significa esse erro? Eu não entendo. Você pode me ajudar com os animais aqui?" 😅

eval.violation_reason: Failed to address user's error query with actionable guidance
eval.improvement_suggestion: Explain the API error context and ask targeted diagnostic questions
